code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn abs(_ x: Int) -> Int
  if x < 0
    -x
  else
    x
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut has_best = false
  mut best_val = 0
  mut best_abs = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws_byte(line, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut j = i
      while j < n and not is_ws_byte(line, j)
        j = j + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(line, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        let a = abs(v)
        if not has_best
          has_best = true
          best_val = v
          best_abs = a
        else if a < best_abs
          best_val = v
          best_abs = a
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = j
    end
  end
  if has_best
    print("min_abs=#{best_val}")
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  process(line)
when None
  ()
end
